  • Download Rmd

SVM Model

library(knitr)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(time_it = local({
 now <- NULL
 function(before, options) {
   if (before) {
     now <<- Sys.time()
   } else {
     res <- difftime(Sys.time(), now, units = "secs")
     paste("Time for this chunk:", round(res, 2), "seconds")
   }
 }
}))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(time_it = TRUE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/Jim/Documents/Project/STAT-472-Project/Data Frame")
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "D:/School/School Work/2025-2026/2026/STAT 472/STAT-472-Project/Data Frame")

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

library(e1071)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(doParallel)
library(ggplot2)

Time for this chunk: 0.04 seconds

data <- read.csv("filtered_timeseries_fifa_players.csv")
var <- read.csv("variables.csv")
temp <- read.csv("defenders.csv")

var <- as.character(unlist(var))
#df <- data %>% select(all_of(var), 7) %>% na.omit()
df <- temp %>% select(all_of(var), 5) %>% na.omit()

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

set.seed(123)

train_index <- createDataPartition(df$value_eur, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train <- df[train_index, ]
test  <- df[-train_index, ]

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

preproc <- preProcess(train, method = c("center", "scale"))

train_scaled <- predict(preproc, train)
test_scaled  <- predict(preproc, test)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

svm_model <- svm(
  value_eur ~ .,
  data = train_scaled,
  type = "eps-regression",
  kernel = "radial"
)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

preds <- predict(svm_model, test_scaled)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

# rmse <- sqrt(mean((preds - test_scaled$value_eur)^2))
# mae  <- mean(abs(preds - test_scaled$value_eur))
# 
# rmse
# mae
# R2(preds, test_scaled$value_eur)

postResample(pred = preds, obs = test_scaled$value_eur)
     RMSE  Rsquared       MAE 
0.2769755 0.9091598 0.1293580

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

cl <- makeCluster(parallel::detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 3,
  search = "random"
)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

# svm_grid <- expand.grid(
#   sigma = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.1),
#   C = c(0.1, 1, 10, 50)
# )

svm_grid <- expand.grid(
  sigma = c(0.01, 0.1),
  C = c(1, 10)
)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

# svm_tuned <- train(
#   value_eur ~ .,
#   data = train_scaled,
#   method = "svmRadial",
#   trControl = ctrl,
#   tuneGrid = svm_grid,
#   metric = "RMSE"
# )

svm_tuned <- train(
  value_eur ~ .,
  data = train_scaled,
  method = "svmRadial",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneLength = 5   # tries 5 random combos
)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

stopCluster(cl)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

svm_tuned$bestTune
NA

Time for this chunk: 0.01 seconds

cl <- makeCluster(parallel::detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

final_model <- svm(
  value_eur ~ .,
  data = train_scaled,
  kernel = "radial",
  cost = svm_tuned$bestTune$C,
  gamma = svm_tuned$bestTune$sigma
)

stopCluster(cl)

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

preds <- predict(final_model, test_scaled)

# rmse_tuned <- sqrt(mean((preds - test_scaled$value_eur)^2))
# mae_tuned  <- mean(abs(preds - test_scaled$value_eur))
# 
# 
# rmse_tuned
# mae_tuned
# R2(preds_tuned, test_scaled$value_eur)

postResample(pred = preds, obs = test_scaled$value_eur)
     RMSE  Rsquared       MAE 
0.2468080 0.9272999 0.1331211

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

df_plot <- data.frame(
  Actual = test_scaled$value_eur,
  Predicted = preds
)

r2 <- cor(df_plot$Actual, df_plot$Predicted)^2

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = min(df_plot$Actual), y = max(df_plot$Predicted),
           label = paste("R² =", round(r2, 3)),
           hjust = 0, size = 5) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted vs Actual Value (SVM)",
    x = "Actual Value",
    y = "Predicted Value"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Time for this chunk: 0 seconds

importance <- varImp(svm_tuned, scale = TRUE)
importance_df <- data.frame(
  Feature = rownames(importance$importance),
  Importance = importance$importance$Overall
)

importance_df <- importance_df[order(importance_df$Importance, decreasing = TRUE), ]

top_n <- 25
importance_top <- head(importance_df, top_n)

ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = reorder(Feature, Importance), y = Importance, fill = Importance)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightgreen", high = "darkgreen") +
  labs(
    title = "Feature Importance (SVM Model) - Defenders",
    x = "Feature",
    y = "Importance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


ggplot(importance_top, aes(x = reorder(Feature, Importance), y = Importance, fill = Importance)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "darkblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Top 25 Feature Importance (SVM Model) - Defenders",
    x = "Feature",
    y = "Importance"
  ) +
  #theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

Time for this chunk: 0.01 seconds
